digest.component_or_area: autolander loop observability + read-only status endpoint
propositions: Add a read-only HTTP status endpoint serving JSON with current wipChain (change, phase, tested_shas, time-in-phase), count of Autosubmit-waiting changes, and heartbeat_age_s, reachable via nginx GET /autolander/status.
Publish an autolander_errors metric fed by three signals: the AUTOLANDER_ERROR marker, the AUTOLANDER_HANDBACK marker, and the Docker unhealthy health-state, with a CloudWatch alarm.
Emit markers as a bare token plus compact JSON on stdout so observability.sh can grep and count occurrences.
Publish autolander_time_in_phase_seconds each poll while non-idle and define a CloudWatch alarm on that metric to surface a wedged-but-alive bot.
Emit autolander_time_to_land_seconds as individual Value datapoints (not StatisticValues) so CloudWatch computes p50/p90/p99 extended statistics downstream.
Service logs only to container stdout and never writes session_log; tests verify JSON shape, marker/metric emission on forced error and hand-back, and the metric PutMetricData call shapes.
